title: Identity Preserving Overhead Phone Cosplay Portrait AI
sourceTitle: Identity Preserving Overhead Phone Cosplay Portrait AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Platform Goal: Create one image asset for both Pinterest and X. It must work as a Pinterest Pin cover and as an X image-hook post that can anchor a prompt thread. Classification: identity-preserving overhead phone cosplay portrait. Hero Subject: fictional adult creator with soft black bob hair, white high rounded collar, pale pink hair ornament, long-sleeve modest cafe apron and covered neckline. Scene or Context: small kitchen corner at night, phone held overhead near the face, cool flash highlights and dense cinematic shadows, wardrobe reads as cute cafe uniform rather than revealing costume. Composition: vertical 9:16 close-up selfie composition cropped at shoulders, strong facial recognition cues, clean background falloff and thumbnail-safe gaze; Pinterest-first vertical 4:5, 2:3, 3:4, or 9:16 framing unless the source format is essential; keep the main subject readable at thumbnail size and center-safe for X previews. Style Language: realistic candid phone photography, gentle enigmatic expression, true hair detail, natural bone structure, shallow depth of field, tasteful modest wardrobe; high-contrast first-glance hook, polished editorial finish, clean visual hierarchy, no raw prompt text shown in the image. Visible Text: no visible text; use English-only readable text if text is part of the design, otherwise no visible text. Restrictions: fictional adult sample, modest and tasteful, no cleavage, no bare midriff, no copied identity, no anime/cartoon/CGI, no plastic skin, no watermark or random text; no watermark, no random text, no real brand logo, no unauthorized celebrity likeness, no copied IP, no distorted anatomy, no clutter. Public-page safety: adult subject only, full-coverage styling, no cleavage, no bare midriff, no lingerie presentation, no sexualized pose, no fetish framing. Output: one polished finished image, no collage unless explicitly requested, no raw prompt text outside designed typography.

imagePrompts.prompt: Platform Goal: Create one image asset for both Pinterest and X. It must work as a Pinterest Pin cover and as an X image-hook post that can anchor a prompt thread. Classification: identity-preserving overhead phone cosplay portrait. Hero Subject: fictional adult woman in a modest pastel cafe-uniform inspired outfit: high white rounded collar, long puff sleeves, covered torso, ruffled apron, holding a small pink spatula at the frame edge. Scene or Context: dim cozy kitchen corner captured as an overhead phone-camera close-up, cool blue-white flash, teal shadows, authentic candid skin texture, face and collar visible but chest fully covered. Composition: vertical 9:16 tight head-and-shoulders phone portrait, face close to lens, eyes looking upward, crop above the upper chest, edge blur kept clean for social crop; Pinterest-first vertical 4:5, 2:3, 3:4, or 9:16 framing unless the source format is essential; keep the main subject readable at thumbnail size and center-safe for X previews. Style Language: photorealistic low-light phone flash portrait, identity-preserving reference-edit logic, natural skin, no doll effect, cinematic teal grade, modest fashion styling; high-contrast first-glance hook, polished editorial finish, clean visual hierarchy, no raw prompt text shown in the image. Visible Text: no visible text; use English-only readable text if text is part of the design, otherwise no visible text. Restrictions: adult subject only, modest full-coverage costume styling, no cleavage, no bare chest, no nudity, no fetish maid framing, no real celebrity likeness, no watermark, no distorted face or hands; no watermark, no random text, no real brand logo, no unauthorized celebrity likeness, no copied IP, no distorted anatomy, no clutter. Public-page safety: adult subject only, full-coverage styling, no cleavage, no bare midriff, no lingerie presentation, no sexualized pose, no fetish framing. Output: one polished finished image, no collage unless explicitly requested, no raw prompt text outside designed typography.
